query: SELECT ticker, MIN(date) as earliest_date, MAX(date) as latest_date, COUNT(*) as total_records FROM historicalPrices WHERE ticker = 'NOVN.SW' AND date >= '2025-01-01' GROUP BY ticker;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, MIN(date) as earliest_date, MAX(date) as latest_date, COUNT(*) as total_records FROM historicalPrices WHERE ticker = 'NOVN.SW' AND date >= '2025-01-01' GROUP BY ticker;
